_README: Paste your REAL affiliate tracking links here, one per program slug, AFTER you're approved (Gate 3). Example: "kit": "https://kit.com/?lmref=YOURID". The moment a link is here, every /go/<slug> on the site starts earning — no other change. Use `node scripts/set-link.mjs <slug> <url>` to add one from the terminal. Leave this file as {} (minus the _README) until you have real links.
